title: Over-formalization (category abstraction loses usability) Maintain
content:
Over-formalization (category abstraction loses usability) Maintain “translation surfaces” – simplified visual analogues of categorical morphisms.

🧠 3. Evolution / Bloom Logic

RLOS_BLOOM(t) =
f(Language_Drift(t-1),
User_Feedback(t-1),
Ethical_Adjustment(t-1),
CrossLingual_Innovation(t-1))
→ Update(Layer_Weights, Grammar_Rules, Visualization_Topology)

Key mechanisms:
1. Language Drift Simulation: probabilistic rewriting on morpho-syntactic graphs.
2. Adaptive Rhetoric: reinforcement signal from audience resonance (RAW only).
3. Ethical Pruning: constraint satisfaction ensuring PUBLIC outputs stay aligned.
4. Self-Representation: code→visual feedback loop using generative typography.
